checks.detail: All required isolation primitives present in Dockerfile.
reasons: present: chmod 700 /tests (L72, re-asserted L98) with go-rwx stripped from contents except fixtures
present: gcc/build-essential installed (verifier runs agent code via build.rs and binary)
note: useradd uses default uid (no explicit --uid 1000) — works on Docker but may need verification on Modal

checks.detail: test.sh hardens /logs/verifier first, runs agent code under strace as agent user, scores outside strace, always exits 0.
reasons: present: cargo build run under strace -f + su agent + env -i + timeout (L222-227)
present: strace tripwire greps openat for reward.{txt,json} with O_WRONLY/O_RDWR/O_CREAT (L230-236)
present: run_all.py executes agent binary as agent under strace (per comments L11-14, L262-268)
present: scoring phase 2 runs outside strace, only diffs captured outputs (L334-367)
present: emit_fail always followed by exit 0; final exit 0 (L370)
present: fallback reward via compute_reward.py --fail in emit_fail()
present: no set -euo pipefail (per comment L24)

checks.detail: runs_agent_code — verifier executes build.rs via cargo build and runs the agent's rls binary; strace + su agent + env -i are all in place.
